title: Prawny Romance
description: A romantic American dish featuring raw king prawns that are pressure-cooked for a salty and light taste, suitable for diabetics.
instructions: Wash hands thoroughly and prepare a clean work area.
Using tongs, place the prawns in a pressure cooker or a suitable heat-safe container.
Drizzle with olive oil and squeeze fresh lemon juice over the top of each prawn to add flavor and enhance its natural sweetness.

Close the pressure cooker lid tightly following manufacturer's instructions for cooking time, which should be minimal due to raw nature but ensure internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C) or above to kill bacteria safely.
